title: Minecraft-VGUI
description: Steam's old look ported to Minecraft
body:
# Minecraft-Vgui
This resource pack aims to recreate the look of 2000`s green Steam in Minecraft!  
Thanks to [Pomi108](https://www.curseforge.com/members/pomi108/projects) who gave me the Idea
## Screenshots  
### Survival Inventory
![Survival-Inventory](https://i.imgur.com/6rC3Ynl.png)
### Creative Inventory
![Creative-Inventory](https://imgur.com/btr9hnG.png)
### Hotbar
![hotbar](https://imgur.com/YswR4Ku.png)
